acceptance_checks: Fixture outputs exist with deterministic ids and digest
Local preflight records required health and version checks
run-live-eval persists judged artifacts and local answer rows
constraints: Reuse run_live_eval_pack(...) rather than cloning its evaluation flow.
Fail closed if effective snapshot ids drift from the fixture manifest.

definition_of_done.behavior_outcome: The harness generates a reviewed fixture and runs it safely against the local stack with persisted eval outputs.
definition_of_done.rollback_or_fallback: Stop before miss export/comparison if fixture or preflight evidence is incomplete.
definition_of_done.verifier_acceptance_condition: Verifier sees fixture identity, local preflight, and runner outputs for the same run.

fallback_or_rollback: Do not interpret partial results if preflight or snapshot identity fails.
primary_behavior: Implement deterministic fixture generation and local eval execution with strict preflight and artifact persistence.
